message:
Running command: # ABC at 8.5 min elapsed - continuing technology mapping
# Log last updated at 10:42, now 10:45 - log buffering, normal during ABC
# Wait 30 min more for synthesis + PnR steps to kick in
sleep 1800
echo "=== 30-min check: $(date) ==="
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
echo ""
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "Steps:"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
echo ""
pgrep -f "yosys-abc" && echo "ABC running" || echo "ABC done"
pgrep -f "openroad" | head -1 && echo "OpenROAD running" || echo "OpenROAD none"
echo ""
stat -c "log: %s bytes mtime=%y" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
echo ""
tail -8 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
